getLatestPrice(address).details: Reverts with InvalidPrice if answer <= 0, or StalePrice if stale

returns.price: Latest price answer from the feed
returns.updatedAt: Timestamp of the last update round

returns._0: True if the last update is older than maxAge seconds

getLatestPrice(address).notice: Fetches the latest price from a Chainlink aggregator feed

isStale(address,uint256).notice: Checks whether a given feed's data is considered stale
